caption: The video shows a static graphic against a vibrant green and yellow abstract swirling background. A centered image depicts a book cover featuring a grey background with a geometric line drawing and the text "Fibonacci 24/7" and "Larry Pesavento". Below this image, the text "FIBONACCI 24/7" is written in a bold white font. A dark blue horizontal banner stretches across the lower third of the screen, containing the name "Basil Chapman" in a large white font. Underneath the name, smaller white text reads "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022". There are no people or physical movements present in the scene; the visual composition remains identical across all frames, indicating a still title card or a stationary informational slide.
